one_time_description: BC FN Gaming Revenue Sharing LP - new revenue source not present in prior year
economic_notes: Investments in Gitanmaax Food and Fuel Ltd., Gitanmaax Development Corporation, and Gitanmaax Market Ltd. recorded using modified equity method. Gitanmaax Market Ltd. fully allowed for due to continuing losses. Band has guaranteed member mortgages totaling $692,180. COVID-19 financial impact expected to be minimal.
notes: Gitanmaax Band Council is located in BC (Hazelton area). Three GBEs accounted for by modified equity method: Gitanmaax Food and Fuel Ltd., Gitanmaax Development Corporation, Gitanmaax Market Ltd. (fully allowed for). No long-term debt in 2020. Ottawa Trust Funds ($522,618) held by federal government classified as financial asset and also shown as equity component. Segment disclosure provided for 8 departments. No remuneration schedule included in the provided statements. isc_funding includes GGC ($7,893,483); total_government_transfers includes GGC + TRICORP + FNHA + CMHC + BC FN Gaming Revenue Sharing LP = $11,671,699 plus rental from government sources estimated; osr calculated as total revenue minus estimated government transfers.
